title: Daniella by Night
writer: Grisha Dabat, Walter Ebert, Wolfgang Steinhardt
actors: Ivan Desny, Elke Sommer, Danik Patisson
plot: Daniella, a fashion model, goes to Rome to replace a model who's been murdered. Once there, she meets two men, Count Castellani, whose clothes she'll model, and Karl Bauer, a reporter in the hotel room next to hers. Castellani giv...
